title: Penalty for violation of Chapter
doc_html:
§117.  Penalty for violation of Chapter

Any public warehouseman who violates any provision of this Chapter shall be fined not more than five thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than five years, or both.
doc_text:
§117.  Penalty for violation of Chapter
Any public warehouseman who violates any provision of this Chapter shall be fined not more than five thousand dollars or imprisoned for not more than five years, or both.
